2026-04-20T08:06:25.9893354Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-20T08:06:25.9894150Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-20T08:06:25.9894832Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-20T08:06:25.9895408Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-20T08:06:25.9896129Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-20T08:09:13.5007529Z I have enough context. The key changes in PR #58341 added:
2026-04-20T08:09:13.5011361Z 1. Eager validation of `previous_response_id` and `conversation.id` before handler invocation
2026-04-20T08:09:13.5016272Z 2. New `Code` and `Param` properties on `ResourceNotFoundException`
2026-04-20T08:09:13.5021036Z 3. Full Foundry error body preservation
2026-04-20T08:09:13.5021490Z 
2026-04-20T08:09:44.5331661Z The README's Troubleshooting section and the handler guide's error table are both outdated and don't document these behaviors. Let me file the issue.

2026-04-20T08:10:02.6535533Z 
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6538713Z ◆ The most recent commit is about updating the azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt version (a bot update). The second most recent is about the [AgentServer] Release Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses 1.0.0-beta.3. Let me look at the AgentServer commit more closely - that's the one with most code changes.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6540844Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6541508Z   Let me look at the commit details for the AgentServer release (PR #58347) to understand what was changed.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6542287Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6542596Z   The key changes in PR #58347 appear to be:
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6543376Z   1. Eager validation of `previous_response_id` and `conversation_id` before handler invocation
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6544146Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6544416Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6545338Z   2. Better preservation of Foundry storage error details in the client responses, including code, message, param, and type information
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6546633Z   3. Enhanced `ResourceNotFoundException` with new `Code` and `Param` properties
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6547825Z   4. Updates to the error mapper to return a tuple with all four error components
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6548455Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6549064Z   Now let me check the AgentServer package's README to see what documentation might be missing.

2026-04-20T08:10:02.6560476Z ✓ github-get_file_contents(owner: Azure, repo: azure-sdk-for-net, path: sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Res..., ref: main)
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6561318Z 
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6562151Z ✓ github-get_file_contents(owner: Azure, repo: azure-sdk-for-net, path: sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Res..., ref: main)
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6563137Z 
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6563778Z ◆ Now I have a good picture of the changes and the documentation state. Let me analyze:
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6564607Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6565062Z   ## Changes in PR #58341 (merged as commit `16a9c8b7`):
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6567419Z   1. **Eager validation of `previous_response_id` and `conversation.id`** - new behavior where these IDs are validated against the provider before the handler is invoked, returning 404/400 immediately instead of silently ignoring invalid references.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6569939Z   2. **`ResourceNotFoundException` gains new properties** - `Code` and `Param` properties added to mirror `BadRequestException` behavior.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6572006Z   3. **Full Foundry storage error body preservation** - `StorageErrorMapper` now extracts `code`, `message`, `param`, `type` fields from Foundry error responses.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6573284Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6573629Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6574690Z   4. **Error status code normalization** - non-400/404/409 errors are now normalized to HTTP 500 instead of proxying the upstream status codes.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6575837Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6576158Z   ## README assessment:
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6578746Z   The README is quite comprehensive with getting started, key concepts, examples, troubleshooting, next steps, and contributing sections. However, the troubleshooting section doesn't currently document the new error handling behavior and validation changes introduced in this PR.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6580993Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6584179Z   Specifically, the README needs updates for the new eager validation of `previous_response_id` and `conversation.id` that happens before the handler is invoked, the new `Code` and `Param` properties on exceptions like `ResourceNotFoundException`, and the specific error responses (404 for missing `previous_response_id`, 400 for invalid `conversation.id`). I should also check if there's an existing handler implementation guide that needs updating.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6587522Z 
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6588758Z ✓ github-get_file_contents(owner: Azure, path: sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Res..., ref: main, repo: azure-sdk-for-net)

2026-04-20T08:10:02.6612621Z 
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6613085Z ◆ Now I have enough context to assess the documentation gaps.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6613701Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6614090Z   ## Summary of Changes (PR #58341, commit 16a9c8b7)
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6614603Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6614924Z   Key new behavior in beta.3:
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6615345Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6616606Z   1. **Eager validation of `previous_response_id` and `conversation.id`** before the handler is invoked. Invalid references now return HTTP 404/400 immediately rather than being silently ignored.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6618318Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6619101Z   2. **`ResourceNotFoundException` gains new `Code` and `Param` properties** - mirrors `BadRequestException`.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6620012Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6620878Z   3. **Foundry storage error body now fully preserved** - `code`, `message`, `param`, `type` from Foundry errors now propagate to clients.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6621883Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6622156Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6622805Z   4. **Non-400/404/409 errors normalized to HTTP 500** - previously could proxy upstream status codes.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6623671Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6623992Z   ## Documentation Gap Assessment
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6624418Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6626682Z   The README's Troubleshooting section covers the standard error cases like 400 for invalid input and 404 for expired response IDs, but it doesn't explain the new eager validation that happens before handlers execute, or document the additional `Code` and `Param` properties now available on `ResourceNotFoundException`.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6629254Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6631091Z   The handler guide's error reference table is also outdated—it shows `error.code` as `null` for `ResourceNotFoundException`, which no longer reflects the actual behavior now that these properties can be populated.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6632688Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6633227Z   These gaps are worth documenting, so I'm going to file an issue about them.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6633834Z 
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6634263Z ◆ I have enough context. The key changes in PR #58341 added:
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6635171Z   1. Eager validation of `previous_response_id` and `conversation.id` before handler invocation
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6636182Z   2. New `Code` and `Param` properties on `ResourceNotFoundException`
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6637125Z   3. Full Foundry error body preservation
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6637617Z   
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6638629Z   The README's Troubleshooting section and the handler guide's error table are both outdated and don't document these behaviors. Let me file the issue.
2026-04-20T08:10:02.6639933Z

CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Do NOT repeat the title as a heading since it already appears as the issue's h1. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. The title appears as the main heading, so keep it brief and descriptive.","type":"string"}},"required":["title","body"],"type":"object"},"name":"create_issue"},{"description":"Report that a tool or capability needed to complete the task is not available, or share any information you deem important about missing functionality or limitations. Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\\n\\n* Preserve full Foundry storage error body (code, message, param, type) in client responses\\n\\nStorageErrorMapper now extracts all structured fields from the Foundry error\\nJSON — code, message, param, and type — and propagates them through the\\nexception hierarchy to the HTTP response returned to the client.\\n\\nKey changes:\\n- ResourceNotFoundException gains Code and Param properties (mirrors BadRequestException)\\n- StorageErrorMapper.ExtractErrorInfo returns (Message, Code, Param, Type) tuple\\n- Default (non-400/404) errors are always returned as HTTP 500, never proxying\\n  the upstream status code\\n- ResponsesApiException for catch-all now includes Param and Type from Foundry\\n- ApiErrorFactory.NotFound accepts optional code and param\\n- ResponsesExceptionFilter passes Code/Param from ResourceNotFoundException\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\\n\\n* Prepare release: Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses 1.0.0-beta.3 (2026-05-05)\\n\\nSet release date for Responses beta.3. Core and Invocations are not\\nreleased in this cycle (no changes since their last release).\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\\n\\n* Address review feedback: doc accuracy, guard relaxation, mock nullability\\n\\n1. Updated XML doc on ThrowIfError to accurately describe which fields are\\n   preserved per exception type (400/404/409 → message/code/param; default →\\n   also type).\\n2. Relaxed ExtractErrorInfo guard to return parsed fields when ANY structured\\n   field is present (not just message). Uses generic fallback for Message.\\n3. Made MockResponse.Content non-nullable — uses BinaryData.FromString(body)\\n   even for empty bodies to match real Azure.Core.Response behavior.\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\\n\\n* Address review comments: fix doc accuracy for conversation.id and error types\\n\\n- Fix test doc: 'conversation_id' → 'conversation.id' to match protocol field name\\n- Expand ValidatingProvider summary to describe both 404 and 400 paths\\n- Update handler comment to reflect multiple possible error types (not just 404)\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\\n\\n* Fix changelog wording: include 409 in excluded status codes\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot
